column2: Verify that an admin can open the detail page of an inactive image version
column3:
1. Login to admin.fctf.site as an admin.
2. Create a docker-backed challenge with EZ_WEB.zip and port 3000.
3. Update the Deploy tab once more so the challenge has at least two versions.
4. Open the Versions tab of the challenge.
5. Choose a row marked OLD and click View detail.
6. Review the version detail page.
column4:
- The version detail page opens successfully.
- The page URL includes /versions/{id}.
- The page shows Image Information and Resource Configuration.
- The page displays the Rollback to This Version action.
column5:
- Admin is logged in to admin.fctf.site.
- EZ_WEB.zip exists in the repo.
- The challenge has at least two recorded versions.
